title: agrostis brevipes
intro: Agrostis brevipes, also known as short red bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of North America and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The roots of Agrostis brevipes have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Agrostis brevipes can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and enhancing immune system function.
